pillars.label: Availability
pillars.desc: Is the SIM present and in stock on the counter display, not sitting unsold in the storage room?

kpis.label: On-Shelf Availability
kpis.desc: SIM is actually on the counter display and viewable by shoppers, not just in the storage room

kpis.label: Out of Stock Rate
kpis.desc: SKUs that should be in stock but are missing or unavailable at time of audit

pillars.label: Share of Space
pillars.desc: How GOMO's SIM products are positioned on the counter display fixture versus competitor SIM brands.

kpis.label: Share of Space
kpis.desc: Counter display placement matches the agreed layout, not crowded out by competitor SIMs

pillars.label: Inventory
pillars.desc: Does the store's counted SIM stock on hand match what should be there, so head office isn't blind to actual inventory?

kpis.label: Stock Variance
kpis.desc: Gap between counted and expected unit count on hand
